purpose: Define source-safe preview validation for visit lifecycle, reservations, schedule/reschedule windows, performed visit and questionnaire completed states without writes or real integrations.
scheduleWindowRules: proposedDate, scheduledAt or rescheduledAt must be >= availableFrom when availableFrom exists.
WK franja allows Monday-Friday unless project rules override it.
WKND franja allows Saturday-Sunday unless project rules override it.
Q1 must stay in day 1-15 unless override approved.
Q2 must stay in day 16-last day of month unless override approved.
Reservation means visit is held in preview, not HR synchronized.
Active reservation must prevent duplicate visible availability.
Out-of-window scheduling requires authorizedBy and authorizedReason before becoming override_approved.
lifecycleRules: performedAt must not be in the future.
questionnaireCompletedAt must not be in the future.
questionnaireCompletedAt must not be before performedAt unless conflict_review_required with note.
Performed visit is not automatically liquidable.
Cancelled visits must not remain available unless released by explicit project/admin rules.
Assignment conflict blocks scheduling until reviewed.
assignmentGateRules: assignment_conflict_blocks_schedule applies when assignment sync outcome is conflict_review_required or manual_review_required.
already_reflected_no_duplicate may proceed if schedule rules are valid.
platform_pending_hr_sync may proceed only as preview/pending HR sync, not HR synchronized.
hr_detected_new_assignment may proceed only if stable keys and shopperId exist.
outputRules: Validator prints JSON report only; no output files are written by default.
Rows must contain safe operational IDs and references only.
Report must include counts by outcome and validation failure.
All gates remain false in the report.
claudePrototypeImpact: Scheduling UI must not say HR synchronized while gates are off.
A reservation must be shown as held/prepared/pending HR sync, not confirmed HR sync.
Out-of-window dates must show failed rule and request override/review.
Performed visit and questionnaire completed must remain separate from submitido and payment.
Cancelled or released reservations must not create duplicate availability.

newLessons: How a reservation holds a visit without HR sync
How availableFrom, franja and quincena are validated
Why performed visit is not questionnaire completed
Why questionnaire completed is not submitido or paid

hardStops: Do not call Make from this preview.
Do not write HR from this preview.
Do not write Firestore from this preview.
Do not mark reservation as HR synchronized while sync gates are off.
Do not mark performed visits as paid.
Do not treat questionnaire completed as submitido.
Do not allow future performedAt or questionnaireCompletedAt as valid without conflict review.
Do not process raw sensitive fields.
